item.description:
# Shruti 1.2.1
Everything from today's launch, hardened.
- **Steady Volume** (new in 1.2.0): per-app ad-blast protection — Shruti learns the loudness you listen at and rides louder ad breaks back down to it. Right-click an app row → "Steady Volume — tame loud ads." - Quitting an app no longer forgets its settings: volume, EQ, output and device memories now survive quit, relaunch, and reboot exactly as you left them. - Additional stability hardening across the audio engine and device handling, and licensing readiness fixes, ahead of public sale.
